summary: Iteration 24: Frontend-only testing of Rich Text Editor features and Reset button. Verified code implementation and tested accessible UI flows. All features are correctly implemented in code.
passed_tests: Resume Optimizer page loads correctly at /resume-optimizer
AI-Powered Resume Tool badge visible
DioAI Resume & LinkedIn Optimizer title visible
Upload → Analysis → Optimize → Download workflow steps visible
Choose File upload button present and functional
Google Drive import option present
Resume upload works - file accepted
Analysis page shows Overall Score (75) and ATS Score (65)
Strengths section displays correctly
Weaknesses section displays correctly
Missing Keywords section displays correctly (Agile, CI/CD, Testing methodologies)
Suggestions section displays correctly
Quick Fix button present and clickable
Quick Fix triggers AI processing and shows preview
Preview/Paywall mode works correctly for unpaid users
Pay EUR 19.99 to Unlock button visible in paywall modal
CODE REVIEW: Rich Text Editor - Font family dropdown implemented (6 options)
CODE REVIEW: Rich Text Editor - Font size dropdown implemented (8pt-36pt, 7 options)
CODE REVIEW: Rich Text Editor - Bold button implemented with data-testid
CODE REVIEW: Rich Text Editor - Italic button implemented with data-testid
CODE REVIEW: Rich Text Editor - Underline button implemented with data-testid
CODE REVIEW: Rich Text Editor - Strikethrough button implemented with data-testid
CODE REVIEW: Rich Text Editor - Section Heading (H2) button implemented
CODE REVIEW: Rich Text Editor - Subheading (H3) button implemented
CODE REVIEW: Rich Text Editor - Bullet list button implemented
CODE REVIEW: Rich Text Editor - Numbered list button implemented
CODE REVIEW: Rich Text Editor - Indent/Outdent buttons implemented
CODE REVIEW: Rich Text Editor - Alignment buttons (left, center, right, justify) implemented
CODE REVIEW: Rich Text Editor - Font color picker implemented (9 colors)
CODE REVIEW: Rich Text Editor - Highlight color picker implemented (6 colors)
CODE REVIEW: Rich Text Editor - Horizontal line/divider button implemented
CODE REVIEW: Rich Text Editor - Link insert/remove buttons implemented
CODE REVIEW: Rich Text Editor - Undo/Redo buttons implemented
CODE REVIEW: Rich Text Editor - More tools dropdown implemented with: Insert Table, Block Quote, Subscript, Superscript, Copy, Cut, Paste, Select All, Clear Formatting
CODE REVIEW: Reset button - Only appears when isEditing=true AND editedText !== originalImprovedText
CODE REVIEW: Reset button - Has data-testid='reset-resume-btn'
CODE REVIEW: Reset button - Calls handleResetResume which resets editedText to originalImprovedText
CODE REVIEW: Reset button - Shows toast 'Resume reset to original improved version'

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All features verified via code review and accessible UI testing

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 24 verified Rich Text Editor implementation via code review. All 14 requested features are implemented in RichEditor.jsx with proper data-testid attributes. Reset button is implemented in ResumeOptimizerPage.jsx with correct conditional rendering (only shows when editing AND text modified). The editor is behind a paywall (EUR 19.99), so direct UI testing of editor features requires payment. Upload → Analysis → Quick Fix flow works correctly. Preview mode shows blurred content with paywall modal.
notes: Rich Text Editor features cannot be directly UI tested without payment. Code review confirms all features are implemented correctly. The editor uses document.execCommand for formatting which is standard for contentEditable-based editors.
